sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zion khua kongpi suak dingin, Lai Siangtho genzo hi;
Ciampel ngeilo i Topa in, A omna ding hong
A kip tawntung suangpi tungta, A kiling zo kei ding hi;
Gupna ding thu tawh omkhawm a,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A hong it tawntung na panin, a hong luang hinna luitui;
tapate in tua tui, lungdam taka dawn uh hi.
Tua bang luitui om ngei hileh, kuamah tha kiamlo ding
Thupha hong pia Pasian bangin, Khang khat pan khang khat kip hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: kiimkot tengah, meii le meikhuam hong langsak;
Hong ompihna lah na’ngin ah, a vangliatna hong
Amau’ an ding manna pia a, Amau’ thuumna a za hi;
